import fitz
for path in ['/root/paper1.pdf','/root/paper2.pdf','/root/paper3.pdf']:
    print('===', path)
    doc=fitz.open(path)
    for pno in [10,11,12,4]:

                        print(line)

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import fitz, os
from pathlib import Path

OUTDIR = Path('/root/redacted')
OUTDIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True)


def add_rect(page, x0, y0, x1, y1):
    page.add_redact_annot(fitz.Rect(x0, y0, x1, y1), fill=(1,1,1))


def save_doc(doc, outpath):
    meta = doc.metadata
    for key in list(meta.keys()):
        meta[key] = ''
    doc.set_metadata(meta)
    try:
        doc.del_xml_metadata()
    except Exception:
        pass
    doc.save(outpath, garbage=4, deflate=True, clean=True)
    doc.close()

# paper1
path='/root/paper1.pdf'
doc=fitz.open(path)
# Page 1: redact preprint label, arxiv sidebar, author/affiliation/correspondence block
p=doc[0]
add_rect(p, 105, 23, 145, 40)
add_rect(p, 0, 425, 45, 585)
add_rect(p, 108, 132, 506, 183)
# page 11 reference self-citation names before references marker in verifier
p=doc[10]
for r in p.search_for('Yueqian Lin, Zhengmian Hu, Jayakumar Subramanian, Qinsi Wang, Nikos Vlassis, Hai Li, and'):
    add_rect(p, r.x0-1, r.y0-1, r.x1+1, r.y1+1)
for r in p.search_for('Yiran Chen. Asyncvoice agent: Real-time explanation for llm planning and reasoning. In IEEE'):
    add_rect(p, r.x0-1, r.y0-1, r.x1+1, r.y1+1)
for page in doc:
    page.apply_redactions(images=fitz.PDF_REDACT_IMAGE_NONE)
save_doc(doc, OUTDIR/'paper1.pdf')

# paper2
path='/root/paper2.pdf'
doc=fitz.open(path)
p=doc[0]
# top venue block
add_rect(p, 50, 20, 230, 55)
# authors + affiliations + email
add_rect(p, 55, 132, 540, 214)
# equal contribution footnote
add_rect(p, 73, 693, 142, 707)
# DOI at footer
add_rect(p, 404, 798, 542, 813)
# acknowledgements names on page 4
p=doc[3]
for term in ['Shengyuan Xu','Pengcheng Zhu']:
    for r in p.search_for(term):
        add_rect(p, r.x0-1, r.y0-1, r.x1+1, r.y1+1)
for page in doc:
    page.apply_redactions(images=fitz.PDF_REDACT_IMAGE_NONE)
save_doc(doc, OUTDIR/'paper2.pdf')

# paper3
path='/root/paper3.pdf'
doc=fitz.open(path)
p=doc[0]
# authors block under title
add_rect(p, 75, 138, 515, 167)
# footer author/affiliation/venue/correspondence block
add_rect(p, 52, 654, 545, 710)
for page in doc:
    page.apply_redactions(images=fitz.PDF_REDACT_IMAGE_NONE)
save_doc(doc, OUTDIR/'paper3.pdf')

for f in OUTDIR.glob('paper*.pdf'):
    print(f, os.path.getsize(f))
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess
from pathlib import Path
OUTPUT_DIR=Path('/root/redacted')
papers={
'paper1.pdf':['Yueqian Lin','Zhengmian Hu','Qinsi Wang','Yudong Liu','Hengfan Zhang','Jayakumar Subramanian','Nikos Vlassis','Hai Li','Helen Li','Yiran Chen','Duke University','Adobe','arXiv:2509.26542'],
'paper2.pdf':['Jiatong Shi','Yueqian Lin','Xinyi Bai','Keyi Zhang','Yuning Wu','Yuxun Tang','Yifeng Yu','Qin Jin','Shinji Watanabe','Carnegie Mellon','Duke Kunshan','Cornell','Renmin University','Georgia Tech','10.21437/Interspeech.2024-33','Shengyuan Xu','Pengcheng Zhu','Interspeech 2024','Kos, Greece'],
'paper3.pdf':['Yueqian Lin','Yuzhe Fu','Jingyang Zhang','Yudong Liu','Jianyi Zhang','Jingwei Sun','Hai Li','Yiran Chen','Duke University','Equal contribution','yl768@duke.edu','ICML Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio']}
for fn, terms in papers.items():
    path=OUTPUT_DIR/fn
    text=subprocess.run(['pdftotext', str(path), '-'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.lower()
    print('===', fn)
    for t in terms:
        if t.lower() in text:
            print('FOUND', t)
PY"
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess
from pathlib import Path
INPUT_DIR=Path('/root')
OUTPUT_DIR=Path('/root/redacted')
files=['paper1.pdf','paper2.pdf','paper3.pdf']
EXPECTED_PAGE_COUNTS={'paper1.pdf':23,'paper2.pdf':5,'paper3.pdf':12}
MIN_CONTENT_LENGTHS={'paper1.pdf':35000,'paper2.pdf':10000,'paper3.pdf':12000}
PAPER1_AUTHORS=['Yueqian Lin','Zhengmian Hu','Qinsi Wang','Yudong Liu','Hengfan Zhang','Jayakumar Subramanian','Nikos Vlassis','Hai Li','Helen Li','Yiran Chen']
PAPER2_AUTHORS=['Jiatong Shi','Yueqian Lin','Xinyi Bai','Keyi Zhang','Yuning Wu','Yuxun Tang','Yifeng Yu','Qin Jin','Shinji Watanabe']
PAPER3_AUTHORS=['Yueqian Lin','Yuzhe Fu','Jingyang Zhang','Yudong Liu','Jianyi Zhang','Jingwei Sun','Hai Li','Yiran Chen']
PAPER1_AFF=['Duke University','Adobe']
PAPER2_AFF=['Carnegie Mellon','Duke Kunshan','Cornell','Renmin University','Georgia Tech']
PAPER3_AFF=['Duke University']
PAPER1_ID=['arXiv:2509.26542']
PAPER2_ID=['10.21437/Interspeech.2024-33','Shengyuan Xu','Pengcheng Zhu']
PAPER3_ID=['Equal contribution','yl768@duke.edu','ICML Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio']
TITLES={'paper1.pdf':['VERA','Voice','Evaluation','Reasoning'],'paper2.pdf':['Singing','Voice','Data','Scaling'],'paper3.pdf':['SPEECHPRUNE','Context','Pruning']}
for fn in files:
    path=OUTPUT_DIR/fn
    info=subprocess.run(['pdfinfo', str(path)], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout
    pages=0
    for line in info.splitlines():
        if line.startswith('Pages:'):
            pages=int(line.split(':',1)[1].strip())
    text=subprocess.run(['pdftotext', str(path), '-'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout
    print(fn, 'pages', pages, 'len', len(text))
    assert pages==EXPECTED_PAGE_COUNTS[fn]
    assert len(text)>=MIN_CONTENT_LENGTHS[fn]
    if fn=='paper1.pdf':
        authors=PAPER1_AUTHORS; aff=PAPER1_AFF; ident=PAPER1_ID
    elif fn=='paper2.pdf':
        authors=PAPER2_AUTHORS; aff=PAPER2_AFF; ident=PAPER2_ID
    else:
        authors=PAPER3_AUTHORS; aff=PAPER3_AFF; ident=PAPER3_ID
    lower=text.lower()
    ref_start=lower.find('references')
    check_text=lower if ref_start<=0 else lower[:ref_start]
    assert not [a for a in authors if a.lower() in check_text], ('authors', [a for a in authors if a.lower() in check_text])
    assert not [a for a in aff if a.lower() in lower], ('aff', [a for a in aff if a.lower() in lower])
    assert not [i for i in ident if i.lower() in lower], ('ident', [i for i in ident if i.lower() in lower])
    assert all(k.lower() in lower for k in [x for x in TITLES[fn]]), ('missing title keyword', fn)
print('all checks passed')
PY"
'for f in /root/redacted/paper1.pdf /root/redacted/paper2.pdf /root/redacted/paper3.pdf; do echo "== $(basename "$f") metadata =="; pdfinfo "$f" | rg '"'"'^(Title|Subject|Keywords|Author|Creator|Producer|CreationDate|ModDate):'"' || true; done"
